daily.today_energy: Mercury's got you feeling chatty and curious today. Channel that brain energy into something creative instead of just doom-scrolling. Your vibe is magnetic right now—people actually want to hear what you have to say.
daily.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your superpower today. Skip the games and say what you actually mean. The right people will vibe with your realness, and honestly, that's the only energy worth entertaining.
daily.career: Your unconventional ideas are getting noticed. Don't dilute your vision to fit what others expect—that's literally your whole thing. Push that proposal or creative concept you've been sitting on. Today favors the bold moves.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel a little activated, so grounding practices hit different today. Touch grass, literally. A walk, some stretching, or even just drinking water slowly will help you feel more centered and less in your head.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to trust your unconventional instincts. A shift in planetary energy suggests that your weird ideas aren't just valid—they're exactly what the universe needs right now. Lean into being yourself, fully.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, honest conversations flow easier than usual. Single? Someone intriguing might slide into your orbit mid-week. Either way, vulnerability looks good on you. Don't mask your authentic self.
weekly.career: Your professional radar is sharp this week. That project idea you've been sitting on? Time to pitch it. Colleagues are actually ready to listen. Collaboration over solo effort brings real wins.
weekly.health: Your nervous system needs gentle attention. Consider grounding practices—walks, journaling, whatever keeps you present. Energy levels fluctuate, so honor that. Rest isn't laziness; it's recalibration.
